dialogue_texts: Marisa
That shrine maiden was not kidding about the air.
Marisa
It's got a nasty, stagnant stench to it. Not exactly the "royal welcome" I was hoping for.
Oh! A visitor! And what a shiny one we have, eh?
Welcome to the grand opening of Autumn!
Helene
I'm Helene Black, the herald of the harvest! Isn't the forest looking just spectacular today?
Marisa
Spectacular? It smells like a wet basement.
Marisa
Look, I'm the Queen around here, looking for that "glohm" mess. Have you seen anything weird?
Helene
Glohm? Is that a new type of fertilizer? I only care about the leaves turning gold!
Helene
You should slow down and appreciate the colors, my majesty!
Marisa
Sorry, but I don't have time for a forest tour.
Marisa
If you're blockin' the path to Yumemura, I'm gonna have to 'tax' you for the delay!
Helene
A tax? Oh, you're a funny one! How about a test of the falling leaves instead?
Marisa
Fine by me! Let's see if your magic is as flashy as my Master Spark!
